description: Style NoteWhy hamper your exercise regime with the wrong pair of shoes? Grab these excellent sports shoes from adidas to improve your performance when you're working out. The finest quality raw materials and excellent features make this shoe a blessing for fitness freaks. Lightweight and comfortable, it also has a sleek style making it a perfect choice as a casual shoe. Product DetailsWhite shoe with synthetic upper and central lace-upsBranding at tongue and heel collarGrey Adidas 3-stripe overlay on sidesLightly padded footbed and a padded tongue Foamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with triangular lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not soak in waterWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not use any detergents or solventsDo not machine wash
